debug_info.goal:
⊢ {n |
      1 < n ∧
        ∀ (deck : Fin n → ℕ),
          (∀ (i : Fin n), 0 < deck i) →
            (Pairwise fun j k => ∃ S, S.Nonempty ∧ (↑(deck j) + ↑(deck k)) / 2 = (∏ i ∈ S, ↑(deck i)) ^ (1 / ↑S.card)) →
              ∀ (i j : Fin n), deck i = deck j} =
    IMO2020P5.answer

ext n; simp [answer]; intro h; refine ⟨λ H i j ↦ ?_, λ _ ↦ h⟩
  by_contra h_ne
  let d i := deck i
  have h_same_mod (m : ℕ) (i j : Fin n) : d i ≡ d j [MOD 2^m] := by
    induction m with
    | zero => simp
    | succ m ih =>
      have h_parity : ∀ i j, (d i + d j) % 2 = 0 := by
        intro i j
        by_cases h_ij : i = j
        · simp [h_ij, ← two_mul, Nat.mul_mod_right]
        · obtain ⟨S, hS, hGM⟩ := H h_ij
          have : ∃ (k : ℕ), (d i + d j : ℝ) / 2 = (k : ℝ) := by
            have : ((d i + d j : ℝ) / 2) ^ S.card = ∏ k ∈ S, (d k : ℝ) := by
              rw [hGM, Real.rpow_inv_nat_pow]
              · exact Nat.cast_nonneg (S.card)
              · exact (Finset.prod_nonneg (λ k _ ↦ Nat.cast_nonneg (d k)))
            obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := Nat.exists_pow_nat_eq_pow_nat_of_pow_eq_prod_pos (m := S.card) (n := 2)
              (by simp [← Nat.cast_prod]; norm_cast at this; exact this) (by simp [hS.ne_empty])
            exact ⟨k, by simp [hk]; field_simp⟩
          obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := this
          have : d i + d j = 2 * k := by norm_cast at hk; linarith
          simp [this, Nat.mul_mod_right]
      have : ∀ i j, d i ≡ d j [MOD 2^(m+1)] := by
        intro i j
        have h_all_same : ∀ k, d k ≡ d i [MOD 2^m] := ih i
        let b k := (d k - d i) / 2^m
        have h_deck k : d k = d i + 2^m * b k := by
          rw [Nat.add_comm, Nat.div_add_mod (d k - d i) (2^m)]
          simp [Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd (ih i k), Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_of_dvd (by simp) (ih i k))]
        have h_pair k l (h_kl : k ≠ l) : (b k + b l) % 2 = 0 := by
          obtain ⟨S, hS, hGM⟩ := H h_kl
          have h_am : (d k + d l : ℝ) / 2 = d i + 2^m * (b k + b l : ℝ) / 2 := by
            rw [h_deck k, h_deck l]; simp; ring
          have h_gm : (∏ m ∈ S, (d m : ℝ)) ^ (1 / (S.card : ℝ)) =
            (∏ m ∈ S, (d i + 2^m * b m : ℝ)) ^ (1 / (S.card : ℝ)) := by
            congr; ext m; rw [h_deck m]
          have h_eq : d i + 2^m * (b k + b l : ℝ) / 2 =
            (∏ m ∈ S, (d i + 2^m * b m : ℝ)) ^ (1 / (S.card : ℝ)) := by rw [h_am, h_gm, hGM]
          have : (b k + b l) % 2 = 0 := sorry
          exact this
        sorry
      exact this i j
  exact h_ne (Nat.eq_of_forall_mod_pow_eq h_same_mod)

    obtain ⟨S, hS, hG⟩ := if h : i = j then ⟨{i}, Finset.singleton_nonempty i, by simp [h]⟩ else hpair i j h
    have h_pow : ((deck i + deck j : ℝ) / 2) ^ S.card = ∏ k ∈ S, (deck k : ℝ) := by
      rw [hG, ← Real.rpow_natCast, ← Real.rpow_mul] <;> simp [hS.ne_empty]
    have h_rat : ∃ q : ℚ, (deck i + deck j : ℝ) / 2 = q := ⟨(deck i + deck j : ℚ) / 2, rfl⟩
    rcases h_rat with ⟨q, hq⟩
    have h_int : ∃ m : ℕ, (deck i + deck j : ℚ) / 2 = m := by
      have h_q_pow : (q ^ S.card).Denom = 1 := by
        have : (q : ℝ) ^ S.card = (∏ k ∈ S, (deck k : ℕ) : ℕ) := by rw [← h_pow]; rfl
        norm_cast at this
      exact ⟨q.num.toNat, by simpa [q.denom_eq_one_iff.mp h_q_pow] using q.num_nonneg.mpr (by simp [hq, hpos])⟩
    rcases h_int with ⟨m, hm⟩
    have : (deck i + deck j) = 2 * m := by
      have : (deck i + deck j : ℚ) = 2 * m := by simpa using hm
      norm_cast at this
    rw [this]; exact Nat.mul_mod_right 2 m
  have h_same_parity : ∀ i j, deck i % 2 = deck j % 2 := fun i j ↦ by
    have h1 := h_even i j
    have h2 := h_even i i
    simp [Nat.add_mod, h1, h2] at *
    omega

    let deck' := fun i ↦ deck i / 2

      use S, hS
      simp [deck', hG]
      field_simp; ring_nf) h_not_all_equal)
  else
    have h_all_odd : ∀ i, deck i % 2 = 1 := fun i ↦ by
      have := h_same_parity i (choose (not_forall.mp h_all_even))
      omega

    sorry

ext n
  simp only [answer, Set.mem_setOf_eq, and_iff_right_iff_imp]
  intro hn deck hpos hgm
  ext i j
  suffices ∀ p : ℕ, p.Prime → ∀ i j, padicValNat p (deck i) = padicValNat p (deck j) from
    Nat.eq_of_forall_padicValNat_eq (hpos i) (hpos j) (fun p hp ↦ this p hp i j)
  intro p hp
  let v i := padicValNat p (deck i)
  let V := Finset.univ.image v
  have h_const : V.card = 1 := by
    by_contra h_card
    let m := V.min' (Finset.Nonempty.image Finset.univ_nonempty v)
    let M := V.max' (Finset.Nonempty.image Finset.univ_nonempty v)
    have : m < M := by
      rcases Finset.card_pos.1 (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (ne_of_gt (Nat.one_lt_iff_ne_zero_and_ne_one.1 (lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.2 h_card) (Ne.symm h_card))).1)) with ⟨_, _⟩
      exact lt_of_le_of_ne (V.min'_le M (V.max'_mem _)) (fun heq ↦ by simpa [heq] using h_card)
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := Finset.mem_image.1 (V.max'_mem _)
    obtain ⟨j, hj⟩ := Finset.mem_image.1 (V.min'_mem _)
    obtain ⟨S, hS, h_mean⟩ := hgm (ne_of_beq_false (by rfl))
    have h_val : (v j + v k : ℚ) / 2 ≥ (∑ i ∈ S, v i : ℚ) / S.card + if p = 2 then -1 else 0 := by
      have : (deck j + deck k : ℝ) / 2 = (∏ i ∈ S, (deck i : ℝ)) ^ (1 / (#S : ℝ)) := h_mean
      sorry
    sorry
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := Finset.card_eq_one.1 h_const
  intro a b
  rw [hx (Finset.mem_image_of_mem v (Finset.mem_univ a)), hx (Finset.mem_image_of_mem v (Finset.mem_univ b))]
sorry

ext n
  simp only [answer, Set.mem_setOf_eq, and_iff_right_iff_imp]
  intro hn deck hpos hgm
  by_contra h_not_equal

  let max_val := (Finset.univ.image deck).max' (Finset.Nonempty.image Finset.univ_nonempty deck)

  have h_min_lt_max : min_val < max_val := by
    obtain ⟨i, j, h_diff⟩ := h_not_equal
    have : deck i ≠ deck j := h_diff
    exact lt_of_le_of_ne (Finset.min'_le _ _ (Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ (Finset.mem_univ i)))
      (ne_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne (Finset.min'_le _ _ (Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ (Finset.mem_univ i)))
      (by have : deck i ≤ max_val := Finset.le_max' _ _ (Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ (Finset.mem_univ i))
          have : deck j ≤ max_val := Finset.le_max' _ _ (Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ (Finset.mem_univ j))
          have : min_val ≤ deck j := Finset.min'_le _ _ (Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ (Finset.mem_univ j))
          intro h; rw [h] at this; have := h_diff; contradiction)))
  let p := Nat.minFac (max_val - min_val)
  let v (x : ℕ) := Nat.valuation p x
  sorry

      have ⟨i, hi⟩ : ∃ i, deck i < m ∧ ∀ j, deck j < m → deck j ≤ deck i := by sorry
      rcases hp i (S_max.toList.head (by sorry)) (by sorry) with ⟨S, hSn, hG⟩
      have : (deck i + m : ℝ) / 2 ≤ (m : ℝ) := by sorry
      sorry
  intro i j; exact h_all_eq i j
sorry
sorry

ext n
  refine ⟨fun h => h.1, fun h => ⟨h, ?_⟩⟩
  intro deck hpos hmeans i j
  sorry
